text: Tracks 1 and 2 ACOs, number of months of Parts A and B eligibility for the 12 month period used for second quarter (from quarterly assignment table in IDR); values from 0-12; will be missing if beneficiary not assigned in quarter (Q2_assign = 0); For Track 3 ACOs, number of months of Parts A and B eligibility for the year-to-date period used for the second quarter (from quarterly assignment table in IDR); values from 0-6; will be missing if beneficiary excluded in quarter (Q2_assign = 0) NUM 2
